title: Dungeon Keys
shopHint: 6 hero skins (Knight, Rogue, Wizard, Skeleton, Paladin, Dark Mage). Collect keys to unlock dungeon gates.
description: Hero moves through a dungeon maze collecting keys while avoiding roaming monsters. Swipe to move between tiles. Exit opens when all keys collected. Three dungeon types: Stone Crypt, Lava Dungeon, Ice Cavern.
